# LEGACY - DO NOT EDIT OR PACKAGE

This `x-hub-system/x-terminal/` tree is legacy.

Do not implement new X-Terminal changes here, and do not package X-Terminal
from this directory.

Active X-Terminal source:

`/Users/andrew.xie/Documents/AX/rust/rust xt/swift-xterminal`

Active X-Terminal build command:

`/Users/andrew.xie/Documents/AX/rust/rust xt/commands/build_xt.command`

The active XT is the paired deep client for the Hub-first architecture. Hub
remains the authority for pairing, grants, skills, memory, model routing,
quota, policy, kill-switch, and audit.

Legacy build/run scripts in this directory intentionally fail closed unless a
developer sets an explicit archival/debug override.
